title: T-003 — Drizzle schema: transfer_orders + to_lines + to_line_lps
prompt:
Add Drizzle pgTable definitions for `transfer_orders`, `to_lines`, `to_line_lps` per PRD §5.5. transfer_orders: id, tenant_id, site_id, to_number unique per tenant, from_warehouse_id FK, to_warehouse_id FK with CHECK from != to, planned_ship_date, planned_receive_date, actual_ship_date, actual_receive_date, status VARCHAR(30), priority VARCHAR(20), notes, shipped_by, received_by, ext_jsonb, schema_version, audit. to_lines: to_id FK, line_number, product_id FK, quantity, uom, shipped_qty, received_qty, notes. to_line_lps: to_line_id FK, lp_id (uuid only — references 05-WAREHOUSE), quantity. Indexes per §5.5.

Generate migration `0003_planning_transfer_orders.sql`. RED test asserts table shape + the from/to CHECK constraint + uniqueness.

pipeline_inputs.description: Drizzle pgTable definitions for transfer_orders + to_lines + to_line_lps.
pipeline_inputs.details: lp_id columns reference 05-WAREHOUSE — declare as uuid without DB-level FK (cross-module boundary handled by service layer). Add CHECK (from_warehouse_id != to_warehouse_id) per V-PLAN-TO-001. shipped_qty <= line.quantity and received_qty <= shipped_qty enforced in service layer (not DB). Include indexes (tenant_id, status, planned_ship_date), (from_warehouse_id), (to_warehouse_id).
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema file loads, when introspected, then all 3 tables export PRD §5.5 columns and correct types.
Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then the CHECK (from_warehouse_id != to_warehouse_id) constraint is present.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/transfer_orders.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then no errors.
test_strategy: RED test for table shape + CHECK constraint presence in generated SQL.
risk_red_lines: Do not add FK to 05-WAREHOUSE lp table at DB level — cross-module boundary.
Do not store multi-site (cross-site) TOs — that is M14 scope per §7.1.
